# Don’t  Miss Out: Learn How to Get Paid Instantly! [Free Workshop]

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-08-19 13:45:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 1019

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Are you a freelancer or service business that’s tired of chasing
invoices and waiting weeks to get paid?

On Wednesday, August 27th, we’ll show you a faster way — one that
lets you get paid instantly, right when clients book you.

Join our FREE live workshop and see how to set it up in minutes
using WP Simple Pay.

Simply click the link below to sign up:

👉 [Workshop] How to Get Paid Instantly as a Freelancer or Service
Business ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.._rDk3q4KsDOUzDt8ZNhqOb4V5RaYI4xEG69b5xSs4ug )

🗓️ Wednesday, August 27, 2025 | 10:30 AM EST

Here’s what you’ll learn from our step-by-step training:

- Why Invoices Delay Payments: Discover why invoices slow you
down and how a simple payment button can get clients to pay
immediately.

- Get Paid Online Without a Cart: Learn how to connect WP Simple
Pay to Stripe and create a payment form in under a minute — no
online store required.

- Collect Recurring Payments: Find out how to set up automatic
billing with lower, more transparent fees than PayPal.

- Put Payments on Autopilot: See how setting up WP Simple Pay
once lets you stop sending invoices and reminders, saving hours
every week.

Plus, there’s a free version of WP Simple Pay available, so you
can get started at no cost.

Don’t miss your chance to finally ditch late payments and start
getting money in your account right away.

👉 Reserve Your Free Spot Now — before it’s too late!  
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.._rDk3q4KsDOUzDt8ZNhqOb4V5RaYI4xEG69b5xSs4ug )⏰

See you there,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
